description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof. The front facade features a prominent entryway with a covered porch, flanked by large windows and a dark-colored fence or railing. The interior layout is open, with visible divisions for living, dining, and bedroom areas, as well as built-in cabinetry and furniture. The exterior walls are primarily white, contrasted by dark blue or black accents on the front and fencing. Windows are arranged in both large and small formats, providing natural light to multiple rooms. The overall design is clean and functional, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric lines.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white exterior walls, and a prominent front entryway with dark accents and large windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch, large windows, and dark fencing detail.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, white exterior wall with smaller windows and visible interior cabinetry.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall with minimal window openings and a glimpse of interior room divisions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows and the continuation of the flat roof and white facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large and small windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with a single main door, flanked by large windows and a dark railing or fence
